meaning: adj.涓嶇渷浜轰簨,鏈彂瑙夌殑,鏃犳剰璇嗙殑
examples: The young man flopped back, unconscious.
He had drunk himself unconscious on vodka.
Lifeguards found members of the public trying to help the man, who was unconscious but breathing.
Still, among many psychiatrists, the notion persisted that the true causes of mental disorders were unconscious.
